entries.title: 支持 badcase trace 记忆评估
entries.author: huajune
summary: Add badcase traceability and memory fixture support across test-suite imports, execution records, conversation snapshots, and Feishu payload handling.
Add Supabase migrations, backfill/check tooling, and workflow documentation for trace-memory evaluation.
Extend dashboard/business trend RPC support, release/deploy notification formatting, and related frontend test-suite/feedback views.
Tighten prompt, memory, and tool behavior used by candidate consultation badcase validation.
features: Add badcase traceability and memory fixture support across test-suite imports, execution records, conversation snapshots, and Feishu payload handling.
Extend dashboard/business trend RPC support, release/deploy notification formatting, and related frontend test-suite/feedback views.
Tighten prompt, memory, and tool behavior used by candidate consultation badcase validation.
ops: Add Supabase migrations, backfill/check tooling, and workflow documentation for trace-memory evaluation.
verification: Pre-push hook: `pnpm run ci:check` passed, including lint, format, typecheck, build, and `jest --coverage --watchman=false` (219 suites / 2574 tests)
